sections.description: Annual Bible reading plan plugin with Today and Annual Table shortcodes, Elementor widgets, progress tracking, a dedicated reader page option, and a scripture reader/importer.
sections.changelog:
Version 0.4.6

  • Fixed the reader back link to return to the shortcode page instead of the site homepage.
  • Kept the source page while opening related passages.
  • Kept the source page while using previous and next reader navigation.
